The user wants me to make a tiny edit to criteria.json to persist the "space transport game thesis" as a hard constraint. Let me add a new ship rule that captures this thesis as a hard constraint.
I'll add the space transport game thesis as a hard constraint to `criteria.json`. Let me make this tiny, coherent edit:

===================================================================
--- /home/jishm/code/generations/criteria.json
+++ /home/jishm/code/generations/criteria.json
@@ -4,7 +4,13 @@

       "description": "All game logic modules must define data schemas for their domain entities before implementation.",

       "rationale": "Data-first design improves clarity, testability, and safer autonomous iteration."

+      "id": "SPACE_TRANSPORT_THEISIS",
+      "description": "The game must center on space transport logistics: hauling cargo between stations via route planning and ship management.",
+      "enforcement": "Design document and core gameplay loops must reflect space transport theme.",
+      "rationale": "This constraint preserves the core thesis through autonomous iterations."
     }
